title: Menopause symptom review

presenting_history.text: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports entered vasomotor, psychological, genitourinary and functional symptom discussion.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

treatment_and_management.text: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports clinician-led review of response, adverse effects, preferences and continuing management.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.

source_limitations: Age, menstrual pattern, symptom profile, history, contraindications, treatment and examination are absent.
No menopause diagnosis, test, hormone therapy, dose or referral is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
